configuration.description: Settings that apply to this contract line
configuration.fixedInfo: Fixed contract lines bill a flat recurring fee regardless of individual service rates.
configuration.fixedInfoDetails: For fixed fee lines, the service rate and quantity are used only for tax allocation purposes. They determine how the fixed fee is proportionally attributed across services for tax calculations. The actual billed amount is the contract line's base rate shown above.
configuration.title: Contract Line Configuration
configuration.usageInfo: Usage-based contract lines are configured per service with unit rates.

description.default: Manage the contract lines and services for this contract
description.readOnly: This system-managed default contract is attribution-only. Contract line authoring is disabled.

empty.selectAbove: Select a contract line above to get started.

errors.cannotEditWithInvoices: Cannot edit contract line: This contract has associated invoices. Contract lines cannot be edited once invoices have been generated.

services.empty: No services configured for this contract line.
services.title: Services ({{count}})

createCustomLine.adjustForPartialPeriodsHelp: When enabled, the recurring fee scales to the covered portion of a service period when the contract starts or ends inside that period.
createCustomLine.basicsDescription: Create a custom contract line directly for this contract.

billingModel.fixedDescription: Charge a flat amount every billing period.
billingModel.hourlyDescription: Bill based on approved time entries.

createCustomLine.billingTimingHelp: Advance billing is typical for fixed fees; arrears for time/usage-based services.
createCustomLine.chooseBillingModelDescription: Select the billing behavior that fits this offering.
createCustomLine.fixedServicesAlertBaseRate: The contract line's base rate (set below) is the billed amount.
createCustomLine.fixedServicesAlertProducts: You can also attach products to this contract line; product quantities are billed as units, while fixed-fee service quantities are used for tax allocation only.
createCustomLine.fixedServicesDescription: Set up services that are billed at a fixed recurring rate.
createCustomLine.hourlyServicesAlertDescription: These services are billed based on actual time tracked.
createCustomLine.hourlyServicesDescription: Configure services that are billed based on time tracked.
createCustomLine.noFixedItems: No fixed fee items added yet. Click "Add Item" above to get started.
createCustomLine.noHourlyServices: No hourly services added yet. Click "Add Hourly Service" above to get started.
createCustomLine.noUsageServices: No usage-based services added yet. Click "Add Usage-Based Service" above to get started.
createCustomLine.recurringBaseRateHelp: Recurring fee for all fixed services.
createCustomLine.title: Create Custom Contract Line
createCustomLine.usageServicesAlertDescription: These services are billed based on actual consumption.
createCustomLine.usageServicesDescription: Configure services that are billed based on usage or consumption.
